title: Kristine Umeh Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Kristine Umeh Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Kristine Umeh
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’23
Career Changer
For most of her life, Kristine Umeh never saw herself as a programmer. However, as she worked her way through the Align program, she surprised herself as she gained confidence working with code.
The high point was actually realizing that this was not a farfetched dream. All you need is the opportunity to learn it
Kristine Umeh, Align MSCS ’23
Explore all Khoury Stories
